summary: SaaS company serving the construction industry seeks a Senior Golang Engineer to join their squad-based development team. The role involves designing and implementing product features using Golang, refactoring for microservices architecture, and collaborating with product managers. Requires 5+ years of Golang and AWS experience, technical leadership throughout full project lifecycle, and proficiency in schema design (RDBMS/KVS). Offers hybrid work, competitive salary with 13th-month bonus, and opportunities to work with modern cloud infrastructure on AWS/GCP.
